{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Lirial training
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Leah]] has undergone [[Lirial training]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c14">''House of Blades'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
